channel.title: Qigong Qi on Daoyin Chuan

item.title: Energy or Qi Moved Through the Body
item.description: Here is a link to an article entitled “How is Energy or Qi Moved Through the Body?” I think the article is very good and most likely the manner in which qi is moved. The truth is we don’t really know other than we can feel it happen. A good read anyway, enjoy!
